name: Topgolf Alpharetta
about: Topgolf Alpharetta is a premier entertainment destination featuring over 100 all-weather hitting bays equipped with HDTVs and climate control. The venue offers a technologically advanced golf experience with high-tech balls that automatically score, along with complimentary club rentals. With a sports bar, restaurant, and various event spaces, it functions as a hybrid entertainment and practice facility. Pricing operates on a per-bay-hour basis with standard rates, complemented by several promotions like half-off golf on weekdays and special event nights.
why_golfers_like_it: Over 100 all-weather bays with climate control for year-round play
High-tech automatic scoring system with complimentary club rentals
Rooftop terrace with fire pits and over 200 HDTVs throughout the venue

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar and restaurant with a diverse menu including vegetarian and gluten-free options. Outside food is not permitted, with the exception of store-bought cakes for celebrations.
Full bar available on-site. The venue does not allow guests to bring their own beverages.

simulator_hardware.notes: Venue features Toptracer technology for its games and scoring system

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary clubs are provided for use at Topgolf Alpharetta.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and beverages are not permitted due to health and safety practices, with the exception of store-bought cakes for birthdays or other celebrations.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Play times vary based on the game and number of players, but a standard round can typically last 1-2 hours per bay.

faq.question: Is Topgolf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Topgolf Alpharetta is kid-friendly. Guests under 16 must be supervised by a guest 21+ at all times, and anyone under 18 must be supervised after 9 PM.
